# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: users-service
    protocol: http
    host: users-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    routes:
      - name: users-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        paths:
          - /users
          - /users/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false

  - name: orders-service
    protocol: http
    host: orders-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    routes:

        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        paths:
          - /orders
          - /orders/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false

  - name: notifications-service
    protocol: http
    host: notifications-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    connect_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    retries: 5
    routes:
      - name: notifications-route
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        paths:
          - /notifications
          - /notifications/
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
          http_failures: 3
      passive:
        type: http
        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
          http_failures: 3
    targets:
      - target: users-v1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: users-v2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: orders-upstream
    algorithm: least-connections
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
          http_failures: 3

          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          tcp_failures: 2

          http_failures: 3

        weight: 100

    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000

        type: http

        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10

          timeouts: 2
          http_failures: 3
    targets:
      - target: inventory-v1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: inventory-v2.internal:8080
        weight: 50

  - name: payments-upstream
    algorithm: consistent-hashing
    hash_on: header
    hash_on_header: x-customer-id
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
          http_failures: 3
      passive:

        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
          http_failures: 3
    targets:
      - target: payments-v1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: payments-v2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: notifications-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 1
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
          http_failures: 3
      passive:

        healthy:
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          tcp_failures: 2
          timeouts: 2
          http_failures: 3
    targets:
      - target: notifications-v1.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: notifications-v2.internal:8080
        weight: 100

plugins:
  - name: request-id
    config:
      echo_downstream: true
      generator: uuid#
